E:\\4. JDJ Solutions\\Projects\\Amarasin.serviceRawFile:
service: car-rental-backend

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs20.x
  region: us-east-1 # Change this to your preferred AWS region
  environment:
    VEHICLES_TABLE: ${self:custom.vehiclesTableName}
    TASKS_TABLE: ${self:custom.tasksTableName}
    BOOKINGS_TABLE: ${self:custom.bookingsTableName}
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:DeleteItem
          Resource:
            - "Fn::GetAtt": [VehiclesTable, Arn]
            - "Fn::GetAtt": [TasksTable, Arn]
            - "Fn::Join": [ "/", [ "Fn::GetAtt": [TasksTable, Arn], "index", "DateIndex" ] ]
            - "Fn::GetAtt": [BookingsTable, Arn]
            - "Fn::Join": [ "/", [ "Fn::GetAtt": [BookingsTable, Arn], "index", "StartDateIndex" ] ]
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - s3:PutObject
            - s3:GetObject
          Resource:
            - "Fn::Join": ["", ["arn:aws:s3:::", {"Ref": "VehicleImagesBucket"}, "/*"]]

custom:
  vehiclesTableName: 'vehicles-table-${sls:stage}'
  tasksTableName: 'tasks-table-${sls:stage}'
  bookingsTableName: 'bookings-table-${sls:stage}'

functions:
  api:
    handler: index.handler
    events:
      - httpApi: '*'

resources:
  Resources:
    # -----------------------------
    # DynamoDB Tables
    # -----------------------------
    VehiclesTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.vehiclesTableName}
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: reg_number
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: reg_number
            KeyType: HASH
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

    TasksTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.tasksTableName}
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: task_id
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: reg_number
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: date
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: task_id
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: DateIndex
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: reg_number
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: date
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

    BookingsTable:
      Type: AWS::DynamoDB::Table
      Properties:
        TableName: ${self:custom.bookingsTableName}
        AttributeDefinitions:
          - AttributeName: book_number
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: reg_number
            AttributeType: S
          - AttributeName: start_date
            AttributeType: S
        KeySchema:
          - AttributeName: book_number
            KeyType: HASH
        GlobalSecondaryIndexes:
          - IndexName: StartDateIndex
            KeySchema:
              - AttributeName: reg_number
                KeyType: HASH
              - AttributeName: start_date
                KeyType: RANGE
            Projection:
              ProjectionType: ALL
        BillingMode: PAY_PER_REQUEST

    # -----------------------------
    # S3 Bucket for Vehicle Images
    # -----------------------------
    VehicleImagesBucket:
      Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
      Properties:
        BucketName: car-rental-vehicle-images-${sls:stage}-${aws:accountId}
        PublicAccessBlockConfiguration:
          BlockPublicAcls: false
          IgnorePublicAcls: false
          BlockPublicPolicy: false
          RestrictPublicBuckets: false
        OwnershipControls:
          Rules:
            - ObjectOwnership: BucketOwnerPreferred

    VehicleImagesBucketPolicy:
      Type: AWS::S3::BucketPolicy
      Properties:
        Bucket: !Ref VehicleImagesBucket
        PolicyDocument:
          Version: "2012-10-17"
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Principal: "*"
              Action: s3:GetObject
              Resource: !Join ["", ["arn:aws:s3:::", !Ref VehicleImagesBucket, "/*"]]

    # -----------------------------
    # Cognito User Pool & Clients
    # -----------------------------
    CognitoUserPool:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPool
      Properties:
        UserPoolName: car-rental-users-${sls:stage}
        UsernameAttributes:
          - email
        AutoVerifiedAttributes:
          - email
        Policies:
          PasswordPolicy:
            MinimumLength: 8
            RequireLowercase: true
            RequireNumbers: true
            RequireSymbols: false
            RequireUppercase: true

    CognitoUserPoolClient:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolClient
      Properties:
        ClientName: car-rental-web-client-${sls:stage}
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool
        ExplicitAuthFlows:
          - ALLOW_USER_SRP_AUTH
          - ALLOW_REFRESH_TOKEN_AUTH
        PreventUserExistenceErrors: ENABLED

    # -----------------------------
    # Cognito User Groups
    # -----------------------------
    AdminGroup:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: Admins
        Description: "Administrator group with full access"
        Precedence: 1
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool

    DataEnterGroup:
      Type: AWS::Cognito::UserPoolGroup
      Properties:
        GroupName: DataEnter
        Description: "Data Entry group with limited access"
        Precedence: 2
        UserPoolId: !Ref CognitoUserPool

  Outputs:
    UserPoolId:
      Value: !Ref CognitoUserPool
    UserPoolClientId:
      Value: !Ref CognitoUserPoolClient
    S3BucketName:
      Value: !Ref VehicleImagesBucket
